user.title: Odace SFSP — BLE send mode
user.description: Choose how BLE commands will be sent to Schneider devices.

data.jeedom_key: Jeedom key (optional, to reuse an existing pairing)

mqtt_broker.title: ESP32/MQTT configuration
mqtt_broker.description: The ESP32 must publish its MAC on `{mac_topic}` at startup (auto-discovery in next step, timeout {timeout}s).

mqtt_mac.title: ESP32 MAC address
mqtt_mac.description:
MQTT topic: `{topic}`
Auto-discovered MAC: **{mac_found}** (empty = not found → enter manually).

abort.mqtt_not_configured: The MQTT integration is not configured in Home Assistant

error.invalid_mac: Invalid MAC address — expected format: AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF
error.invalid_uuid: Invalid UUID — 6 hex characters required (e.g. 9c0300). Check that the bytes are not reversed.

advanced_settings.title: Jeedom key / Controller MAC
advanced_settings.description:
**Current Jeedom key:** `{current_key}`
**Current controller MAC:** `{current_mac}`

Changing the Jeedom key requires re-pairing all commandable devices (use `bind_device` service). Leave a field empty to keep the current value.

data.jeedom_key: Jeedom key (leave empty to keep current)
data.mac: BLE controller MAC (HCI dongle or ESP32 — leave empty to keep current)

import_export.title: Export / Import devices
import_export.description: {device_count} device(s) configured. Copy the export or paste a list to import (existing UUIDs are skipped).

add.title: Add a device
add.description:
Recently detected BLE devices: **{pending}**

— **Logs/Jeedom** format: UUID as shown in logs (e.g. `9c0300`)
— **Module label** format: reversed bytes (e.g. `00039c` → converted to `9c0300`)

If a detected device is selected, the UUID field is ignored.

data.name: Name (leave empty for automatic name)
data.mac: BLE MAC address of the device (optional)

edit.title: Edit device
edit.description:
Current UUID: `{current_uuid}` — Label equivalent: `{reversed_uuid}`

Choose the format in which you are entering the new UUID.

error.already_exists: A device with this UUID already exists
error.invalid_mac: Invalid MAC address — expected format: AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF
error.invalid_uuid: Invalid UUID — 6 hex characters required (e.g. 9c0300). Check that the bytes are not reversed.

send_command.name: Send a command
send_command.description: Sends an Odace SFSP BLE frame
